languages.original_text: "All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."

languages.text: "Все так, однако я все еще не могу найти ответа на вопрос, почему Караул Смерти вообще присутствуют в Просторе Коронус. Не уверен, что когда-нибудь получу на этот вопрос ответ".
"All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."
languages.original_text: "Все так, однако я все еще не могу найти ответа на вопрос, почему Караул Смерти вообще присутствуют в Просторе Коронус. Не уверен, что когда-нибудь получу на этот вопрос ответ".

traits.locale_text: "All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."
"All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."
"All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."

languages.text: 「確かにそうだが、それでも私は、死の番人がなぜコーロナス・エクスパンスに存在するのかという疑問に答えを見つけることができない。その答えを得ることは、おそらく永遠にないだろう」
languages.original_text: "All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: 「確かにそうだが、それでも私は、死の番人がなぜコーロナス・エクスパンションに存在するのかという疑問に答えを見つけることができない。その答えを得ることは、おそらく永遠にないだろう。」

languages.text: « C'est vrai, mais je n'arrive toujours pas à comprendre ce que fait la Deathwatch dans les Étendues de Koronus. Je ne suis pas sûr de trouver un jour la réponse à cette question. »
languages.original_text: "All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: « C'est vrai, mais je n'arrive toujours pas à comprendre ce que fait la Deathwatch dans les Étendues de Koronus. Je ne suis pas sûr de trouver un jour la réponse à cette question. »

languages.text: "Das stimmt, aber ich frage mich immer noch, was die Deathwatch in der Koronus-Ausdehnung zu suchen hat. Und ich bin nicht sicher, ob ich auf diese Frage jemals eine Antwort bekomme."
languages.original_text: "All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: "Das stimmt, aber ich frage mich immer noch, was die Deathwatch in der Koronus-Ausdehnung zu suchen hat. Und ich bin nicht sicher, ob ich auf diese Frage jemals eine Antwort bekomme."

languages.text: "Hepsi doğru ancak yine de Ölümnöbeti'nin neden Koronus Enginliği'nde bulunduğu sorusuna cevap bulamıyorum. Bu sorunun cevabını alabileceğimden emin değilim."
languages.original_text: "All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: "Hepsi doğru ancak yine de Ölümnöbeti'nin neden Koronus Enginliği'nde bulunduğu sorusuna cevap bulamıyorum. Bu sorunun cevabını alabileceğimden emin değilim."

languages.text: «Muy cierto todo, pero yo sigo sin saber qué hacen los Vigías de la Muerte en la Extensión de Koronus. Y no creo que halle nunca la respuesta a esa pregunta».
languages.original_text: "All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: «Muy cierto todo, pero yo sigo sin saber qué hacen los Vigías de la Muerte en la Extensión de Koronus. Y no creo que halle nunca la respuesta a esa pregunta».

languages.text: “话虽如此，可我始终想不通：死亡守望为何会出现在科罗努斯扩区？这个问题恐怕永远不会有答案了。”
languages.original_text: "All true, however, I still cannot find an answer to the question of why the Deathwatch are even present in the Koronus Expanse. I'm not sure I will ever receive an answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: “话虽如此，可我始终想不通：死亡守望为何会出现在科罗努斯扩区？这个问题恐怕永远不会有答案了。”
